Domain Registration

Get the Best Web Hosting in Kenya with WebRegister

Claim Your Kenyan Business Presence with a .KE Domain.
Register .com .org domains with us today

.KE Domain Registration

Registering a domain with Web Register Limited is a seamless and hassle-free process designed to help you establish your online presence swiftly. Whether you’re launching a personal blog, an eCommerce site, or a corporate website, the right domain name is the first step to building your digital identity.

As the best domain registrar in Kenya, we offer a variety of domain extensions tailored to suit different industries and individual preferences. From popular extensions like .co.ke, .com, and .org to specialized options such as .net, .biz, and more, Web Register Limited ensures that you’ll find the perfect match for your brand’s identity.

A Domain Name That Reflects Your Brand

Your domain name is more than just a web address – it’s the face of your business online. Web Register Limited understands the importance of choosing a domain name that aligns with your brand. We help you select a domain name that is memorable, brandable, and SEO-friendly, so your business can stand out in a crowded online marketplace

Webhosting Services

Affordable and Reliable Web Hosting in Kenya

At Web Register Limited, we pride ourselves on offering affordable and reliable web hosting in Kenya that meets the needs of businesses of all sizes. Whether you’re just starting out or you’re managing a high-traffic corporate site, our hosting solutions are designed to give you high performance without the high price tag. We are recognized as a cheap web hosting company that never compromises on quality.

Website Design Services

At Web Register Limited, we understand that exceptional website design is key to establishing a powerful online presence. Our team of expert developers is dedicated to crafting bespoke, responsive websites that reflect your brand’s unique identity and captivate your audience.

Why Choose Web Register Limited for Website Design?

  • Tailored Solutions: We specialize in custom website design tailored to your specific needs, ensuring a unique and engaging user experience.
  • Responsive Design: Our websites are optimized for all devices, providing a seamless experience for users on desktops, tablets, and smartphones.
  • SEO Optimization: We implement the latest SEO best practices, ensuring your website ranks high in search engine results and attracts organic traffic.
  • Fast Load Times: Utilizing advanced technologies, we ensure your website loads quickly, enhancing user satisfaction and engagement.
  • Secure and Reliable: Our designs include robust security features to protect your data and ensure your website operates smoothly.

FAQs

What is a domain name?

A  domain name is a unique name that identifies an Internet site. An Internet domain name is a one-of-a-kind web address that you can purchase for your organization through Webregister Kenya read more

How do I buy a domain name forever?

Technically speaking there is no way to buy a domain name forever. You can buy one for up to 10 years, and information on the expiration date can be provided to you by the registrar you registered the domain name with for renewal. There are a few exceptions to these. Read more

What is web hosting, and why do I need it?

Web hosting is a service that allows you to store your website files and make your website accessible online. Without hosting, your website cannot be accessed by visitors.

Register with us today

Which web hosting plan is best for my business?

It depends on your needs:

  • Shared Hosting – Ideal for small businesses and personal websites.

  • VPS Hosting – For medium-sized businesses that need more control.

  • Dedicated Servers – Best for high-traffic websites needing maximum performance.

How much does web hosting cost in Kenya?

At WebRegister, hosting plans start from as low as Ksh 2,100 annually, depending on the package you choose.

Do I get a free domain with web hosting?

Yes! Some hosting plans include a free .co.ke domain name for the first year. Get a free domain with our Diamond and Platinum packages.

How can I upgrade my hosting plan?

You can upgrade anytime via your WebRegister client dashboard or contact our support team for assistance.

What is a domain name, and why is it important?

A domain name (e.g., www.yourbusiness.co.ke) is your website’s online address. It makes it easy for customers to find you online. Get yours today here.
